[Workflow Task from Orchestrator]
Workflow ID: 562d1b6a-982

Priority: 2

Task: Research and compare Redis vs Memcached for 2024-2025. Specifically find: (1) recent performance benchmarks comparing throughput and latency, (2) new features in Redis 7.x vs Memcached 1.6.x, (3) real-world case studies from high-scale deployments, (4) memory efficiency comparisons, (5) any emerging alternatives (KeyDB, Dragonfly, etc.) worth considering. Synthesize findings with clear recommendations for different use cases.

Search for Redis 7.x new features and changelog details. Look for: Redis 7.2, 7.4, 7.5 new capabilities, performance improvements, and notable additions. Also search for Memcached 1.6.x latest features and changes. Compare the innovation pace of both projects.

Search for KeyDB and Dragonfly cache alternatives 2024-2025. Find: KeyDB performance claims, Dragonfly benchmarks, other emerging Redis alternatives. Look for independent comparisons and real production adoption stories.

Search for Redis Memcached case studies 2024-2025 high scale deployments. Find: companies using them at scale, migration stories, lessons learned. Include: memory efficiency comparisons, operational insights.
